creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
If it is what you are expected, then the document needs to be fix. Any  =

users can't just simple 'make PREFIX=3D/foo install' as what in the hand=
book  =

has shown. Also, included fix ports(7). Need to explain more clear  =

something like if you want to install all ports in one prefix, then do t=
he  =

'make PREFIX=3D/foo LOCALBASE=3D/foo install'. If you want to install al=
l  =

others in default prefix, but just a port in different prefix then you  =

need to run 'make depends' first before you run 'make PREFIX=3D/foo inst=
all'.

I personal still think that the 'make PREFIX=3D/foo' shouldn't affect on=
  =

dependencies at all, but I have been using the workarounds for so long  =

time. It is already in my habit.

Cheers,
Mezz


-- =

mezz7@cox.net  -  mezz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD GNOME Team  -  FreeBSD Multimedia Hat (ports, not src)
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
